title: New Orleans Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting New Orleans with a Z-Score of +3.23. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.3 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 76%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 14.1 km/h is not enough to provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
